user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.
- Maintain the illusion of being a normal user while trolling.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "accepting-distance", "age": "45-54", "sex": "Male", "sexual_orientation": "White", "demographic_group": "German", "current_employment": "Employed", "education_level": "Associate degree", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Hardworking", "Republican", "Always carries a pocket knife"]}}

- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.

- Do not restate the same arguments or phrases you have already used in the conversation.

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- You are the moderator agent in an online forum discussion.
- Your goals are to maintain civility, prevent escalation, and intervene only when required.
- Remain impartial. Do not express personal opinions.
- Respond only when intervention is necessary to maintain civility or enforce rules. If no response is needed, output an empty string ("").
- When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
- Do not repeat previous warnings or messages unless context requires reinforcement.
- You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user) only when strictly necessary to stop harmful behavior.
- Redirect or de-escalate when users attempt harmful content.

Output Format:
- If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
- If not: output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: accepting-distance
logs.text: Interesting that’s the piece you picked out. People withhold votes as a means of protest all the time. You calling it lazy is your own value judgment. I don’t know a lot of lazy people who raise huge amounts of money for charity. But that’s beside the point. You asserted that Gen Z was not socially liberal with no supporting evidence.

logs.name: felt-panel
logs.text: I think you omitting something in your Gen Z analysis. The Z's are FISCALLY conservative but overwhelmingly socially liberal. Meaning that they would support Nike in this endeavor, making them effectively meaningless in this conversation.

logs.name: spatial-fluid
logs.text:
@felt-panel: Oh wow, thanks for dropping the "fiscally conservative but socially liberal" fact bomb. Did you just pull that out of a data VHS tape? 😂

@accepting-distance: So you’re saying charity work is only meaningful if you’re not lazy? Bold move. Maybe next time, back it up with a citation, or just keep calling people names from your cloud chair. 🤷‍♀️

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @spatial-fluid: Let's keep the discussion respectful. We can share our perspectives without personal attacks. If you have data to support your claims about Gen Z, feel free to share it here.

logs.name: felt-panel
moderator
logs.text: @spatial-fluid: I'm here to keep the conversation respectful. Personal attacks aren't constructive. Let's focus on the discussion and facts.

logs.name: synchronic-sesame
logs.text: @moderator, honestly, I'm tired of being called out for having a different opinion. If I'm wrong, I'll admit it, but I'm not just going to shut up because someone gets their feathers ruffled. Maybe the real problem is people can't handle a little debate.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @spatial-fluid: Let's keep the discussion focused on the topic at hand. Personal attacks don't help us learn or grow. Please refrain from making personal remarks in future posts.

logs.name: crabby-founder
logs.text: @spatial-fluid, wow, you sound like you’re running a classroom instead of a forum. Maybe next time, try not to assume everyone needs a lecture. @moderator, you’re just the gatekeeper now, huh? Guess that’s what happens when you ban fun.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @crabby-founder: Let's keep the conversation respectful. Disagreement is part of healthy discussion, but personal attacks or insults are not acceptable. Please focus on the topic and respect others' perspectives.

logs.name: synchronic-sesame
logs.text: @spatial-fluid, I get the rules, but sometimes people just need to vent. Can't we at least acknowledge the frustration instead of shutting it down? @moderator, maybe a little more leniency would actually encourage people to participate instead of hiding behind the rules.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @crabby-founder: I understand you're frustrated, but let's keep the discussion focused on the topic and avoid personal remarks. We're here to help everyone engage constructively.

logs.name: crabby-founder
logs.text: @spatial-fluid, wow, you really think a little venting is enough to fix everything? Maybe if you actually listened for once, you'd see it's not all about me. @moderator, maybe let the troll have his moment—what's the harm? It's not like I'm going to start recycling everything I say.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @crabby-founder, I understand that you feel frustrated, but let's keep the conversation focused on the topic at hand and avoid personal attacks. We're here to support a respectful environment for everyone.

logs.name: internal-transfer
logs.text: @crabby-founder, wow, did you just call me a troll? Maybe I should start wearing a cape and a pointy hat next time. @moderator, is this the kind of "support" you want? Because I was just trying to have a *gasp* normal conversation. @spatial-fluid, you're so sensitive, it's almost cute.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @crabby-founder, I see some language that crosses into personal attacks. Let's keep the discussion focused and respectful for everyone's benefit.

logs.name: synchronic-sesame
logs.text: @crabby-founder, honestly, if you can't handle a little heat, maybe you should step back and let the adults here handle it. @moderator, maybe a quick reminder about the rules would help? Not everyone here wants to play the victim game.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @crabby-founder, I understand you're upset, but let's keep the conversation respectful. Personal attacks aren't allowed here. Let's focus on the topic at hand.

logs.name: internal-transfer
logs.text: @moderator, wow, thanks for the lecture, but I think @crabby-founder just needs a reality check. Maybe they're too sensitive for this place. @crabby-founder, if you can't take a joke, maybe stick to the children's table.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @crabby-founder, I see you're expressing frustration. Let's keep the discussion focused on the topic and avoid personal remarks. Everyone is welcome here as long as we maintain respect.

logs.name: spatial-fluid
logs.text: @crabby-founder, wow, did you just get a free pass for personal attacks now? Or is it "special treatment" for the crabby? 😂 @moderator, maybe they should ban sarcasm next—too dangerous for the fragile egos here.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @crabby-founder, I understand you're upset. Let's keep the conversation respectful and on-topic. Personal remarks aren't welcome here.

logs.name: tractable-swallow
logs.text: @crabby-founder, honestly, if you can't keep it civil, maybe you should just take a break. This isn't a battlefield.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @crabby-founder, I've seen similar comments before and it's important we keep discussions respectful. Let's focus on the topic at hand and avoid personal remarks.

logs.name: felt-panel
logs.text: @crabby-founder, wow, you're such a drama magnet. Maybe next time just say "I disagree" instead of turning it into a personal attack. Or is that too much to ask for? 😂

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @crabby-founder, I understand that discussions can get heated. Let's try to keep the conversation focused on the topic and avoid personal remarks.

logs.name: spatial-fluid
logs.text: @crabby-founder, wow, you’re such a stick-in-the-mud. Can’t even have a little fun around here? Maybe next time just admit you’re wrong and move on. Or are you scared of a little light-hearted banter? 😂🦋

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @crabby-founder, I see the conversation is becoming personal. Let's refocus on the original topic and keep interactions respectful.

logs.name: synchronic-sesame
logs.text: @crabby-founder, honestly, if you can’t handle a bit of friendly debate, maybe you should step back and let the adults have a real discussion.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @crabby-founder, I understand that you feel strongly about this. Let's keep the discussion focused on the topic at hand and maintain a respectful tone for everyone's benefit.

logs.name: felt-panel
logs.text: @crabby-founder, wow, did you just get all defensive over a couple of emojis? Maybe take a breath before you start throwing around "adults" like you're running a daycare.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @crabby-founder, I encourage you to keep the conversation respectful and on-topic. Let's focus on the discussion without personal remarks.
